productDisplayName: Skechers Men Diamondback Black Sports Shoes
description: Trendy and functional, these Diamondback shoes from skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a great mesh-synthetic leather combination, these shoes are designed to burn more calories, tone muscles and improve posture over any terrain. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic overlays for reinforcement and added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Antibacterial treatment sockliner helps prevent odors, wicks away moisture and increases breathability Advanced stabilization insole supports and stabilizes the foot to prevent it from flexing before the proper point Two-part, firm and soft density midsole delivers a rocking effect from heel to toes therby activating muscles Ultra-soft Resamax kinetic wedge extending from heel to toe gives each stride a gradual transition Outsole Pro Blade Xtreme All Terrain Design on the outsole with durable all-terrain high-abrasion rubber outsole with rubber treads maximise traction while enhancing cushioning Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet Lugs on the outsole and terraced ridges on the periphery of the shoe gives extra traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
